product_overview: Cultif is a mobile-first web app for discovering global recipes, following creator-made step-by-step cooking videos, and building meal plans. The platform centers creators (chefs) who can monetize via per-chef subscriptions while users explore, subscribe, cook, and save meals.
core_goals: Enable fast, mobile-first recipe discovery filtered by country, dietary tags, category, and cook time
Deliver step-by-step video-based cooking experiences with clear progress and completion tracking
Support a creator-first monetization model: per-chef subscriptions that gate premium content (ingredients & steps)
Provide an 8-step chef-friendly recipe creation wizard including timeline-based video segmentation
Offer meal planning tools (manual now, AI generation deferred) to help users schedule recipes by day and meal slot
Smooth onboarding and role selection to convert new users into chefs when desired

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Email/password sign up and sign in flow that redirects new users to role selection and returning users to the discover feed.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth -> Toggle between Sign In and Sign Up tabs -> Fill Full Name input -> Fill Email input -> Fill Password input -> Click Sign Up button -> See loading state while authenticating -> Auto-redirect to /role-select after new user sign up

Navigate to /auth -> Toggle between Sign In and Sign Up tabs -> Fill Email input -> Fill Password input -> Click Sign In button -> See loading state while authenticating -> See error alert on invalid credentials

features.name: Discover Feed
features.description: Home feed showing recipe cards with horizontal category and country scrollers and a filter modal to refine results.
user_flows: Navigate to /discover -> Scroll horizontally through category bubbles -> Scroll horizontally through country filter chips -> Tap filter icon to open filter modal -> Select dietary, category, country, and max duration filters -> Tap Apply in filter modal to apply filters -> See recipe cards in feed -> Tap a recipe card to navigate to /recipe/:id

Navigate to /discover -> Tap filter icon to open filter modal -> Select country and dietary filters that match no recipes -> Tap Apply in filter modal to apply filters -> See empty state message when no recipes match filters

features.name: Explore Grid
features.description: Instagram-style 3-column image grid with mixed cell heights and a bottom-sheet preview for quick browsing.
user_flows: Navigate to /explore -> Scroll vertically through 3-column image grid -> Tap a grid cell to open recipe preview bottom sheet -> Tap View Recipe button in bottom sheet to navigate to /recipe/:id -> Tap outside bottom sheet to dismiss it
Navigate to /explore -> Tap a grid cell to open recipe preview bottom sheet -> Bottom sheet fails to load preview -> See error message in bottom sheet -> Tap outside bottom sheet to dismiss it

features.name: Recipe Detail
features.description: Full recipe page that shows hero image, chef info, metadata, nutrition, and an ingredients list that may be gated by subscription.
user_flows: Navigate to /recipe/:id -> View recipe cover image, title, and description -> View chef info and tap chef name to navigate to /chef/:id -> Tap Ingredients button to open ingredients modal -> If subscribed, see full ingredients list -> Tap Cook Now button to navigate to /recipe/:id/cook

Navigate to /recipe/:id -> View recipe cover image, title, and description -> Tap Ingredients button to open ingredients modal -> See "Subscribe to see all ingredients" notice if not subscribed -> Tap paywall notice to navigate to /recipe/:id/paywall

features.name: Paywall / Subscription Gate
features.description: Subscription screen where users choose monthly or annual plans to unlock a chef's full recipe content and start checkout via Polar.
user_flows: Navigate to /recipe/:id/paywall -> View chef profile info and pricing options -> Choose monthly or annual subscription plan -> Tap subscribe button to initiate subscription -> See checkout initiation or redirect to Polar checkout
Navigate to /recipe/:id/paywall -> Choose monthly plan -> Tap subscribe button to initiate subscription -> Payment fails during checkout -> See payment error and option to retry

features.name: Recipe Cooking Steps
features.description: Step-by-step cooking mode presenting the current step, video segment, and navigation to advance or go back through steps.
user_flows: Navigate to /recipe/:id/cook -> View current cooking step with instructions -> Watch video for the current step -> Tap Next to advance to next step -> Repeat until final step -> On final step, auto-navigate to /recipe/:id/complete
Navigate to /recipe/:id/cook -> View current cooking step with instructions -> Tap Next to advance to next step -> Network error prevents loading next step -> See error banner and option to retry

features.name: Recipe Completion
features.description: Celebration and post-cook actions after a user finishes all cooking steps, with sharing and navigation back to discovery.
user_flows: Navigate to /recipe/:id/complete -> See completion animation and congratulation message -> Provide star rating input -> Tap Back to Discover to navigate to /discover
Navigate to /recipe/:id/complete -> See completion animation and congratulation message -> Tap Share -> Native share fails or is unsupported -> See error toast or fallback copy-to-clipboard option

features.name: Recipe Creation Wizard
features.description: Authenticated chef-only 8-step wizard to create recipes, including video upload and timeline-based marker segmentation, with upload progress and publishing options.
user_flows: Navigate to /create -> Step 1 - Upload cover image, enter title and description -> Step 2 - Add ingredients with name, amount, and unit -> Step 3 - Select recipe country of origin -> Step 4 - Set prep and cook time -> Step 5 - Select weight/fitness goals -> Step 6 - Select meal type -> Step 7 - Select dietary tags -> Step 8 - Upload video and place timeline markers for segments -> Agree to upload rules and submit recipe -> See upload progress screen -> On success, see created recipe at /recipe/:id

Navigate to /create -> Complete Steps 1–7 -> Step 8 - Upload video and place timeline markers -> Click submit to upload -> See upload progress screen -> Video upload fails -> See upload error with retry and cancel options

features.name: Profile Menu
features.description: User profile area to update avatar and display name, navigate to settings and sub-pages, and manage chef pricing or account switching.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile -> Tap avatar to upload a new profile picture -> See upload progress and updated avatar -> Tap pencil icon to edit display name -> Confirm name edit with checkmark -> Tap Share button to navigate to /profile/share
Navigate to /profile -> Tap avatar to upload a new profile picture -> Upload with unsupported file type -> See error alert and prompt to select a supported file

features.name: All Countries Browser
features.description: Browse countries with flags and navigate to a discover feed filtered by the selected country.
user_flows: Navigate to /countries -> Scroll through list of countries -> Tap a country to navigate to /discover?country=[name] -> See discover feed filtered by selected country
Navigate to /countries -> Tap a country -> Discover feed loads with no matching recipes -> See empty state message in /discover

features.name: Meal Plans
features.description: Create and manage weekly meal plans by assigning recipes to day/meal slots via a Create Plan wizard and Browse Recipes overlay.
user_flows: Navigate to /plans -> View list of existing meal plans -> Tap Create Plan button to start new plan wizard -> Enter plan name and description -> Assign recipes to breakfast/lunch/dinner slots per day via Browse Recipes overlay -> Save plan -> See completed plan in /plans
Navigate to /plans -> Tap Create Plan -> Assign a recipe to a slot -> Network error prevents assigning recipe -> See error message and option to retry assignment

features.name: Chef Profile
features.description: Public chef profile showing bio, recipes, stats, and a Subscribe button to begin a per-chef subscription.
user_flows: Navigate to /chef/:id -> View chef avatar, name, and bio -> Scroll through chef's published recipes -> Tap a recipe to navigate to /recipe/:id -> Tap Subscribe button to initiate subscription flow
Navigate to /chef/:id -> Tap Subscribe button -> Paywall/checkout initiation fails -> See error and option to retry or contact support

features.name: My Dishes
features.description: Chef-only list of uploaded recipes with edit and delete controls; supports editing via the creation wizard and deletion with confirmation.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile/dishes -> View grid of own recipes -> Tap a recipe to navigate to /recipe/:id -> Tap edit overlay to open /create?edit=:id -> Make edits and submit -> See updated recipe at /recipe/:id
Navigate to /profile/dishes -> Tap delete button on a recipe -> Confirm deletion in modal -> Deletion fails due to server error -> See error alert and option to retry

routes.description: Sign in / sign up with email and password
Home feed showing recipe cards with filters
Select user role (cook or chef) during onboarding
Full recipe detail with ingredients and info
Create or edit a meal plan
User profile menu with avatar, name, settings links
List of recipes created by the user

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Sign up and sign in with email and password using Convex Auth
user_interactions: Toggle between Sign In and Sign Up tabs
Fill Full Name input (sign up only)
Fill Email input
Fill Password input
Click Sign In or Sign Up button
See loading state while authenticating
See error alert on invalid credentials
Auto-redirect to /discover after successful login
Auto-redirect to /role-select after new user sign up

api_calls.endpoint: Convex auth signIn("password", { email, password, flow })

Tap pencil icon to edit display name
Confirm name edit with checkmark or Enter key
Cancel name edit with Escape key
Tap menu items to navigate to sub-pages (dishes, settings, etc.)
Tap Share button to navigate to share page
Tap Switch Account to open account switcher popup
Tap Add Another Account in switcher popup
Tap an existing account in switcher to switch to it

known_limitations.issue: Explore search bar is UI-only and has no filtering logic wired up
Explore filter chips (Dishes/Weight gain/Lose weight) are not implemented
known_limitations.impact: Filter chips are absent from the UI

known_limitations.issue: AI plan creation flow is hidden; app defaults to manual plan creation
known_limitations.impact: AI-generated meal plans are not accessible from the UI

known_limitations.issue: Auth uses email/password only; no OAuth providers
known_limitations.impact: Users must register with email and password
